titleStmt.title: SII 5.632: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 632. (A.R. No. 74 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyal vāyttu maṇvaḷara puliyāṉaiyuñ cakkaramum ceyal vāytta tirumakaḷum ciṟaṉtu vāḻa
veṇmatipoṟ kuṭai viḷaṅka velveṉtar raṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭaṉtai manaṅ kaḷippa maṉuniti taḻait toṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolu
m tikkaṉaittuñ cela naṭāttak kaṟpakālat tavatarittu teca mellā miruḷ nikki teṉticaiyil pona taṇṭu poramaittu
tiriyavāṅki ceruviṉaiyāl ciṟai piṭittu teṉṉanavaṉait tiṟai koṇṭu tiruvaṭikki paḻaṭaivittu vaṭaticaiyil pona taṇṭu mahā
meruvaip piṟkiṭṭu Aṭaleḻum pukaḻ parappi paripavattāl vaṉtetirttu tiruvaraṅkam pukaḻ viḷaṅka tiyākavirakkoṭi Eṭu
ttu vākai virakkaḻal kaṭṭi tikkeṭṭum Eval keṭpac cakkaraveṟpil pukaḻ Eṟippa cempoṉ virasiṁ hāsa nattu
puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruṉtaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉ(m)marāṉa tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum ka
ruvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu virar Apiṣekamum vijai yar Apiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa śrī tiripuvanavirate
vaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 4vatu kaṉniṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu daśami yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ vaṭakarai rāca
rācavaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaḻapāṭiyuṭaiyār koyilil kumpiṭṭirukkum śrīmā heśvara
rkaḷil Eyilppākkiḻāṉ vikkaviṉāyakaṉ Empirāṉ campaṉtaneṉ Iṉnāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi kalaiyamaṅkalattu ma
ṉaikaḷil cotināyakaṉ tiruttoppukkueḻuṉtaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikku kiḻakku Uḷḷa maṉaikaḷ nikki Ittiruvitikku meṟku teṉpāṟ kel
lai kalaiyamaṅkalattu viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kalaiyamaṅkalam Uḷḷiṭṭa viḷainilaṅkaḷukku kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟ kellai cotināyakaṉ tiruttoppukku teṟkum Iṉnāṉ kellaikkuḷ Uṭkkaṭaiyāy nāṭaṟipukaḻnallūr Iṟaiyi
li maṉaikaḷāy cipaṇṭārattu kācu paṟappaṭṭu Ādi caṇṭeśva ratevar tirunāmattu Ivvūrk kāvaṟkāṇiyuṭaiya kūttapperu
māṉ Aracūrnāṭāḻvāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa piramāṇappaṭi maṉai kuḻi Aṟupattu nālum Ivaṉ tampi ṉāyyaṉān tuṇṭa
ṉāṭāḻvāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa maṉai kuḻi pattaraiyum cāttamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Āḷavantāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa ma
ṉai kuḻi muppattiraṇṭum Āṉaimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ pañcanativayirattūṇ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa maṉai kuḻi Irupattoṉṟarai
yum Āka maṉai kuḻi ṉūṟṟirupat teṭṭiṉāl Ūṟppaṭi nilam kāṇiyum Uṭpaṭa vaḷaiyamaḻakiyaperumā ḷeṉṉum tiruṉā
mattāl tirunaṉtavanamāka nāṉ ceykaiyil Ittirunaṉtavanañ ceyyum tiruttoṇṭarkaḷukku tiruvamutukkum veṭṭi
kkum Uṭalāka nāṉ koṇṭuviṭṭa nilamāvatu śrīkaṇṭarātittaccaturvveti maṅkalattu kaṇṭarātittacceri perumaru
tūrk kauciyaṉ Āḷavaṉtāṉ Aṉapāyappiramamārāyaṉ makaṉ tirumaḻapāṭipaṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ivvūr teṉpiṭā
kai kotaṇṭarāmanallūrp piṟiṉta Iṉnāyaṉār tevatānam Etirilicoḻamaṅkalattu coḻamātevi vatikku kiḻakku
kulamāṇikka vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu nilam muṉṟumā Itil keṟkaṭaiya nilamāka
Araikkāṇi nikki Itaṉ kiḻakku nilam Oru māvaraiye Araikkāṇi Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi Itil teṟkaṭaiya me
ṟpaṭi nilam Araimā Innilam Araimāvum kaṇṭarātittaccaturvve timaṅkalattu kaṇṭarātittaccerit tirupperuṉtuṟaik kevutama
ṉ tirumaḻapāṭiyuṭaiyāṉ pañcanativāṇapaṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ivvūr teṉ piṭākai kotaṇṭarāmanallūril Iṉnāyaṉār tevatāṉa
māp piṟiṉta Etirilicoḻamaṅkalattilum kulottuṅkacoḻamaṅkalattilum kaṇṭarātittavatikku meṟkku cuntaracoḻaṉvāykkālukku teṟku nālāṅ
kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu nila mukkāṇi Itil kulottuṅkacoḻap peruvaḻi nilam Araikkāṇi nikki Ivaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ū
ṟpaṭi nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi Iṉnilam Araimā Araikkāṇiyum kaṇṭarātittaccatu[ rvve ti] maṅkalattu kaṇṭarātittacceri vā
cciyaṉ citaraṉ nāraciṅkapaṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa nāṭaṟipukaḻnallūṟ piṟiṉta Iṉnāyaṉār tevatānam nittaviṉotama
ṅkalattuk kaṇṭarātittavatikku meṟku cuṉtaracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu teṉkiḻkkaṭaiya nila
m Araikkāṇi Iṉnilam Araikkāṇiyum Ivvatikku kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu meṟku naṭavil
cāranilam Araikkāṇi Iṉnilam Araikkāṇiyum Āka Ūṟpaṭi nilaṅ kāṇi Iṉnilam kāṇiyum viṟaikiḻaiyāṉa tañcai tiruvuṭaiyā
ṉ kaṭikaiveḷāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Iṉnāyaṉār tevatānam kaṇṭarātittaccaturvve timaṅkalattup piṭākai Ulakuyyavaṉtaco
ḻanallūṟ piṟinta poṉnārmeni viḷākattu kaṇṭarātittavatikku kiḻakku kulamāṇikka vāykkālukku vaṭakku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭā
ñ catirattum Eḻāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattum nilam Araimā Iṉnilam Araimāvum Iṉnāyaṉār koyiṟkaṇakku neṟkuppai Uṭai
yāṉ kūttāṭuvāṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ tirumaḻapāṭi nampi Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ikkoyiṟkaṇakku neṟkuppaiyuṭaiyāṉ Ārāvamuta kūttāṭuvāṉ
rācarācamuveṉtaveḷā ṉuḷḷiṭṭārum pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Iṉnāyaṉār tevatānam Anapāyanallūril kaṇṭarātittavatikku meṟku cuṉtaraco
ḻavāykkālukku teṟku Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāṉ tuṇṭattu mekka ṭaiya nilam Araimā muṉtirikai Iṉnilam Araimā muṉtirikaiyum brahmadeya]
m punavāyilāna vikkirama timaṅkalattu perumarutūr Āttiraiyaṉ nampippirāṉ Ātittapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Ittirunaṉ
tavaṉam ceyvāṟku Uṭa namakku nirvārttut taṉta nāṭaṟipukaḻnallūr kaṇṭarātittavatikkuk kiḻakku cuṉtaracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭak
ku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam Orumā mukkāṇi nikki Itaṉ kiḻakku kulottuṅkacoḻamaṅkalattut taṉta nilam Araikkā
ṇi Iṉnilam Araikkāṇiyum Ūṟpaṭi nilam Irumāvarai muṉtirikai Iṉnilam Irumāvarai muṉtirikaiyum Ittevatā
nam paṭa yiṟu ṉa nilattu Iṟai mikutiyāna Uṭal Ittirunaṉtavana
ka candrā tittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatāka kalveṭaṭik kuṭutteṉ Eyiṟ
I Ūraṉṉeṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai perumarutūṟ kavuciyaṉ Āḷavaṉ
ṭi Uṭai Eḻuttu
ṉā Ivai tirupperuntuṟai kevutamaṉ tirumaḻa Eḻuttu
citaraṉ nāraciṅkapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ip ṉ tañcai tiruuṭaiyā
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koyiṟ kaṇakku neṟkuppaiyuṭaiyāṉ kūttāṭuvāṉ Ā
ḷuṭaiyāṉ tirumaḻapāṭi nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivaik koyiṟkaṇakku neṟkuppaiuṭaiyāṉ Ā
rāvamutu kūttāṭuvāṉ Irācarāca muveṉtaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai perumarutūr Āttireyaṉ
nampippirāṉ Ātittapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai perumarutūr Āttre yaṉ nampippirāṉ peri
yauṭaiyāṉ pañcanativāṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Itu paṉamāheśva ra rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 5.632 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
